data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not demonstrate any mechanisms or checks in place to prevent the creation of permanent event types, which is a critical aspect of the requirement. The linked use case only illustrates the generation of a temporary booking link without addressing how permanent event types are managed or avoided. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the expected behavior of preventing permanent event types is not supported by the current evidence.
gaps: No evidence of mechanisms to prevent the creation of permanent event types.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
